slide1.title: More friends, more money
slide1.subtitle: The more the merrier — everything is better when shared and Tagpeak is no exception. Invite your friends, grow your network and get a % on their cashback forever.

slide2.title: Cash in at any time.
slide2.subtitle: Want to cash in on your rewards? You have the power to withdraw at any time, sending the funds directly to your bank account.

slide3.title: New partnerships added
slide3.subtitle: We are proud to welcome the following brands to the Tagpeak family.  We are excited about the opportunities these new partnerships bring — start shopping now and watch your rewards grow!

auth.currency-warning: (It's not possible to change the currency after the account is created)

dialog-currency.title: Thank you!
dialog-currency.message: Thank you for choosing Tagpeak to enhance your shopping experience.
dialog-currency.message2:
Since you did not have an account with us, we created one for you and set the default currency to Euro (€).

Please choose your preferred currency now, as this selection cannot be changed later.
dialog-currency.reload_info: The current window will be reloaded in 10 seconds to take into consideration this change. Reload any other window open to see the changes in effect.

account-verified.title: Account verified!
account-verified.message: Welcome to Tagpeak. Browse our partner brands, make a purchase and start earning rewards that grow over time.

slide1.title: Welcome to Tagpeak!
slide1.message: Earn every time you shop online with a financial reward paid by brands. Earn high-potential cashback ranging from 0% to 100%, all made possible through strategic investments in the financial markets.

slide2.title: Shop and earn. It’s free.
slide2.message: Start by shopping at any of our partner stores. As you shop, we seamlessly track your transaction, earning a commission from our valued partners. No extra costs. The investment is financed by the brands you shop.

slide3.title: Your daily updates.
slide3.message: Each reward will move every day, depending on the investment performance. As with any investment, it does not go well every time and you may end up with a reward of 0%. But remember, you did not pay extra for the product or service you bought.

slide4.title: Cash in at any time.
slide4.message: Want to cash in on your rewards? You have the power to withdraw at any time, sending the funds directly to your bank account.

slide5.title: More friends, more money
slide5.message: The more the merrier — everything is better when shared and Tagpeak is no exception. Invite your friends, grow your network and get a % on their cashback forever.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.first-purchase: Make your first purchase from our partner stores and follow here your cash reward evolution!

details.stop-anytime-info: Whenever you feel comfortable with your reward, you can press the “Stop” Button and collect your reward. Or, you can wait and maybe win more.

stop-confirmation.title: Stop this reward?
stop-confirmation.body: Cash Reward will stop moving and we will confirm the final amount within 2 business days.
stop-confirmation.footer-message: Read our FAQs for more information
stop-confirmation.success: Request was sent to admin for stopping.
stop-confirmation.error: Error when requesting to send to admin to stop.

info-card.title: Reach {{membership}} status and unlock more earnings
info-card.body: Spend {{valueSpend}} to reach {{membership}} to unlock and collect your rewards and more.
info-card.last-membership-body: You reached the last level of membership. You can continue to earn rewards.

reward-summary.win: Win up to 10% of your friends cashback once they start purchasing.

description.TRACKED: We've successfully tracked your transaction. Now we have to wait for the partner store to validate it. This does not depend on us and may take a few days or weeks.
description.VALIDATED: Your transaction has been confirmed by the partner store and your cash reward will be launched in the next 2 working days.
description.LIVE: Our investments are currently live. Your reward may move every day until the Stop Date or until you press the Stop button.
description.EXPIRED: The investment period has passed. The final reward will be added to your balance within 2 working days.
description.FINISHED: Congratulations! This cash reward is now available for withdrawal.
description.STOPPED: You have successfully stopped your cash reward. It will become available within 2 working days.
description.REQUESTED: This cash reward is part of a withdrawal request already submitted.
description.PAID: This cash reward has been already withdrawn successfully.
description.REJECTED: Your transaction has been rejected by the partner store.

store-visits.title: Store Visits
store-visits.nothing-here-body: You have not visited any store yet. This place is for you to track past store visits.
store-visits.no-results-body: We haven’t found any visits with those terms.

balance-withdrawals.nothing-here-body: You have not yet withdrawn any reward.
balance-withdrawals.cannot-withdrawal: You have not reached threshold limit of {{value}} for Withdrawal.
balance-withdrawals.success-create: Your withdrawal requested will be processed in the next 2 business days.
balance-withdrawals.error-create: Something went wrong, please try again later.

confirmation-withdrawal.title: Are you sure you want to make a withdrawal?
confirmation-withdrawal.message: Your withdrawal requested will be processed in the next 2 business days.

your-referrals.win: Win up to 10% of your friends cashback once they start purchasing. How does this work?
your-referrals.nothing-here-subtitle: Invite your friends, share your referral link and get a % on their cashback forever.

how-it-works.what-need: What do you need to do?
how-it-works.share-friends: A share of your friends' cash rewards
how-it-works.status-recommended: Status they get when recommended by you
how-it-works.notes-text:
A successful referral means someone who registered with your referral link and made a transaction successfully. If you reach Silver or Gold, you will win 5% or 10% of your friends' all-time cash rewards forever.
Standard cash reward percentage for Members can be found on each partner store page at our website.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.body: These Website Standard Terms and Conditions written on this webpage shall manage your use of our website, TagPeak accessible at https://tagpeak.com.
introduction.sub-body: Minors or people below 15 years old are not allowed to use this Website.

intellectual-property-rights.title: Intellectual Property Rights
intellectual-property-rights.body: Other than the content you own, under these Terms, TagPeak and/or its licensors own all the intellectual property rights and materials contained in this Website. You are granted limited license only for purposes of viewing the material contained on this Website.
intellectual-property-rights.sub-body: You are granted limited license only for purposes of viewing the material contained on this Website.

restrictions.title: Restrictions
restrictions.body: You are specifically restricted from all of the following:

body-specification.1: publishing any Website material in any other media;
body-specification.2: selling, sublicensing and/or otherwise commercializing any Website material;
body-specification.3: publicly performing and/or showing any Website material;
body-specification.4: using this Website in any way that is or may be damaging to this Website;
body-specification.5: using this Website contrary to applicable laws and regulations, or in any way may cause harm to the Website, or to any person or business entity;
body-specification.6: engaging in any data mining, data harvesting, data extracting or any other similar activity in relation to this Website;
body-specification.7: using this Website to engage in any advertising or marketing.

restrictions.sub-body: Certain areas of this Website are restricted from being access by you and TagPeak may further restrict access by you to any areas of this Website, at any time, in absolute discretion. Any user ID and password you may have for this Website are confidential and you must maintain confidentiality as well.

your-content.title: Your Content
your-content.body: In these Website Standard Terms and Conditions, "Your Content" shall mean any audio, video text, images or other material you choose to display on this Website. By displaying Your Content, you grant TagPeak a non-exclusive, worldwide irrevocable, sub licensable license to use, reproduce, adapt, publish, translate and distribute it in any and all media.
your-content.sub-body: Your Content must be your own and must not be invading any third-party's rights. TagPeak reserves the right to remove any of Your Content from this Website at any time without notice.

no-warranty.title: No warranties
no-warranty.body: This Website is provided "as is," with all faults, and TagPeak express no representations or warranties, of any kind related to this Website or the materials contained on this Website. Also, nothing contained on this Website shall be interpreted as advising you.

limitation-liability.title: Limitation of liability
limitation-liability.body: In no event shall TagPeak, nor any of its officers, directors and employees, shall be held liable for anything arising out of or in any way connected with your use of this Website whether such liability is under contract. TagPeak, including its officers, directors and employees shall not be held liable for any indirect, consequential or special liability arising out of or in any way related to your use of this Website.

indemnification.title: Indemnification
indemnification.body: You hereby indemnify to the fullest extent TagPeak from and against any and/or all liabilities, costs, demands, causes of action, damages and expenses arising in any way related to your breach of any of the provisions of these Terms.

severability.title: Severability
severability.body: If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid under any applicable law, such provisions shall be deleted without affecting the remaining provisions herein.

variation.title: Variation of Terms
variation.body: TagPeak is permitted to revise these Terms at any time as it sees fit, and by using this Website you are expected to review these Terms on a regular basis.

assignment.title: Assignment
assignment.body: The TagPeak is allowed to assign, transfer, and subcontract its rights and/or obligations under these Terms without any notification. However, you are not allowed to assign, transfer, or subcontract any of your rights and/or obligations under these Terms.

entire-agreement.title: Entire Agreement
entire-agreement.body: These Terms constitute the entire agreement between TagPeak and you in relation to your use of this Website, and supersede all prior agreements and understandings.

governing-law.title: Governing Law & Jurisdiction
governing-law.body: These Terms will be governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of the State of us, and you submit to the non-exclusive jurisdiction of the state and federal courts located in us for the resolution of any disputes.
